description: Test engineers need to perform a GVT on a new aircraft to identify its natural frequencies and validate structural models.

nodes.task_description: Attach hundreds of accelerometers to strategic points on the aircraft's structure.

expected_outcome.value: Agent ensures all sensors are correctly installed and connected.

nodes.task_description: Use electrodynamic shakers to excite the structure at different frequencies.

expected_outcome.value: Agent operates the shakers to vibrate the aircraft according to the test plan.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the accelerometer data to identify the aircraft's modal frequencies and damping ratios, and compare them to the FEA model.

expected_outcome.value: Agent analyzes the data and confirms the structural model is accurate.
